en.title: Best Mesh Wi-Fi Systems 2026
en.description: Wi-Fi 7 has finally closed the gap between theoretical specs and real-world gains — these are the mesh systems worth upgrading to in 2026.

zh-tw.title: 最佳 Mesh WiFi 系統 2026
zh-tw.description: WiFi 7 在 2026 年真的進入成熟期，這份排行幫你找出值得升級的 Mesh 路由器。

en.description: Quad-band WiFi 7 powerhouse with dual 10G ports per node, zero subscription fees, and the fastest real-world throughput tested in 2026.

zh-tw.description: 四頻 WiFi 7 旗艦，雙 10G 網路孔、免訂閱費，是 2026 年實測速度最快的 Mesh 系統。

en.description: The best value WiFi 7 mesh in 2026 — a 2-pack for $299 with four 2.5G ports per node and tri-band coverage across 5,800 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: WiFi 7 入門 CP 值最強選手，不到一萬塊就有三頻 Mesh、每個節點四個 2.5G 孔，定價非常誇張。

en.description: The only mesh router with built-in Zigbee, Thread, and Matter hub — the single best choice for smart home power users, despite the subscription paywall for parental controls.

zh-tw.description: 唯一內建 Zigbee、Thread 和 Matter Hub 的 Mesh 路由器，智慧家庭玩家的首選，但進階功能需要另付月費。

en.description: eero's flagship Wi-Fi 7 mesh with two 10 Gig ports per node and a built-in Zigbee, Thread, and Matter smart home hub, the pick for smart home power users who want a genuine multi-gig backbone alongside eero's set-it-and-forget-it simplicity.

zh-tw.description: eero 的 Wi-Fi 7 旗艦，每個節點兩個 10 Gig 網路孔，內建 Zigbee、Thread、Matter 智慧家庭 Hub。想要真正多 Gig 骨幹又懶得搞複雜設定的智慧家庭玩家，這台一次到位，eero 的無腦好用在這代直接做到頂。

en.description: High-throughput tri-band WiFi 7 with SFP+ support and multi-gig wired backhaul — built for power users with 2.5 Gbps internet or a complex wired backbone.

zh-tw.description: 支援 SFP+ 光纖上行的高階 Mesh 系統，有多個 Multi-Gig 孔，適合已有多 Gbps 網路或要做有線回程的進階玩家。

en.description: Netgear's sensibly-priced WiFi 7 mesh delivers strong range and consistent speeds at a fraction of the Orbi 970's cost — the large-home pick without sticker shock.

zh-tw.description: Netgear 在 WiFi 7 世代定價終於回到合理範圍，覆蓋範圍廣、速度穩定，大坪數住宅的聰明選擇。

en.description: Extreme coverage for very large homes or small offices — a 3-pack reaches 9,000 sq ft — but the price makes it overkill for anyone without a genuine coverage problem.

zh-tw.description: 三包裝覆蓋面積最高達 9,000 平方英尺，對一般家庭火力明顯過剩，真的有超大空間或辦公室需求才值得考慮。

en.description: ASUS's proven WiFi 6E flagship — 10G WAN and 2.5G LAN ports, no subscription fees — now at a discounted price as WiFi 7 models take over the lineup.

zh-tw.description: ASUS WiFi 6E 旗艦款，有 10G WAN 和 2.5G LAN，WiFi 7 新品上市後售價降了不少，是相對划算的降階選擇。

en.description: Google's WiFi 6E mesh excels at simplicity and Google Home integration, though the 1 Gbps ethernet ports cap real-world wired performance below the wireless potential.

zh-tw.description: Google 智慧家庭生態的最佳搭配，設定超簡單，但只有 1G 有線網路孔，對有高速網路的人是明顯的硬體瓶頸。

en.description: Quad-band BE33000 flagship that splits the 6GHz spectrum into two dedicated bands, with two 10G ports per node and 7,800 sq ft coverage on a 2-pack — TP-Link's answer to the Orbi 970 at half the price.

zh-tw.description: BE33000 四頻旗艦，6GHz 拆成兩個獨立頻段、每節點兩個 10G 孔，雙包裝覆蓋 7,800 平方英尺。坦白講，這就是 TP-Link 對標 Orbi 970 的價格屠夫，效能該有的全有。

en.description: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7 BE11000 2-pack with four 2.5GbE ports and aggressive sub-$300 pricing — the value benchmark for whole-home Wi-Fi 7 in 2026.

zh-tw.description: 三頻 Wi-Fi 7 BE11000 雙入組，四個 2.5GbE 埠加上不到三百美金的價格，是 2026 年 Wi-Fi 7 全家覆蓋的性價比指標。

en.commentary:
WiFi 7 stopped being a spec-sheet fantasy in 2026. Multi-Link Operation — the technology that lets a single device maintain simultaneous connections across multiple bands — now delivers real latency reductions that I can measure. Gaming under a WiFi 7 node feels closer to wired ethernet than any previous wireless generation, and that matters for the growing share of homes where running cable is not realistic.

The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro earns the top position for combining the fastest real-world speeds I've seen from any mesh system with hardware that feels five years ahead of the market. Tom's Hardware clocked close-range 6 GHz throughput above 3.5 Gbps. Every node ships with dual 10G ports and quad-band radio. Every security feature — AiProtection Pro from Trend Micro, parental controls, VPN server — is included permanently with the hardware purchase. No monthly fee.

The TP-Link Deco BE63 lands at number two because $299 for a 2-pack with four 2.5 Gbps ports per node at WiFi 7 is a price that should not exist yet. It does. If you have a 1–2.5 Gbps internet connection and a two-story house, this is where your money goes.

Subscription pricing defines the middle of this list. The eero Pro 7 is the only mesh router with a genuine smart home hub built in — Zigbee, Thread, and Matter from one box — but Amazon charges $9.99 per month to unlock parental controls. Netgear applies the same logic with Armor security and Smart Parental Controls sold as separate annual subscriptions. ASUS and TP-Link do not charge a recurring fee for any of these features.

At the bottom of this list, the Google Nest WiFi Pro remains a competent system with excellent setup, but the 1 Gbps ethernet ceiling becomes a genuine bottleneck the moment your internet service exceeds a gigabit. In 2026, multi-gig broadband is no longer a niche offering.

highlights.title: ASUS BQ16 Pro earns first place by refusing to charge a subscription
highlights.body: The BQ16 Pro is the only mesh system in this comparison that delivers dual 10 Gigabit wired connectivity on every node while requiring zero subscriptions for security or parental control features. AiProtection Pro, powered by Trend Micro, ships permanently with the hardware. Combined with the fastest WiFi 7 throughput in real-world testing — Tom's Hardware measured 3.5+ Gbps on the 6 GHz band at close range — the BQ16 Pro is the clear answer for buyers who want flagship performance without signing up for a recurring billing relationship.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 redefines what $299 can buy in 2026
highlights.body: The Deco BE63 (now marketed as Deco 7 Pro) ships with four 2.5 Gbps Ethernet ports per node at a 2-pack price of $299. That port density used to be reserved for $1,000+ systems. Tri-band WiFi 7, 5,800 square feet of coverage with a 2-pack, and a fast app-based setup round out a package that undercuts the competition by a margin that will embarrass rivals charging three times as much for similar real-world performance.

highlights.title: eero Pro 7 is the only real choice for serious smart home setups
highlights.body: No other mesh router on the market ships with Zigbee, Thread, and Matter hub functionality built in. For anyone running HomeKit, Google Home, or Amazon Alexa automations across dozens of devices, consolidating the smart home hub and the router into one box removes an entire layer of network complexity. The eero+ subscription for parental controls is a legitimate complaint. The underlying hardware capability remains unique, and it is worth the tradeoff for buyers who would otherwise need a separate smart home hub anyway.

highlights.title: Subscription pricing is the hidden cost that changes which system is actually worth buying
highlights.body: The Netgear Orbi 770 and 870 charge separately for Netgear Armor ($99.99/year) and Smart Parental Controls ($69.99/year). The eero Pro 7 charges $99.99/year for eero+. Over five years of ownership, these subscriptions add $500 to $1,000 to the total cost of the system. ASUS and TP-Link include all security features with the hardware, permanently. This is not a minor pricing detail — it changes which system is actually the better value across its useful life.

highlights.title: WiFi 6E systems belong at the end of this list in 2026
highlights.body: The Google Nest WiFi Pro and ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 are both WiFi 6E systems in a market where WiFi 7 2-packs now start at $299. The ET12 remains capable with its 10G WAN port and a proven reliability track record, making it a reasonable choice at its discounted 2026 street price. The Nest WiFi Pro's 1 Gbps ethernet port is the harder limitation to overlook — as multi-gig broadband reaches more homes, this hardware bottleneck becomes more relevant to more buyers.

zh-tw.commentary:
WiFi 7 在 2026 年終於不是規格表上的空話了。Multi-Link Operation 技術讓裝置可以同時跑多個頻段，實際量測下來延遲比 WiFi 6E 低了一個明顯等級。我在 WiFi 7 節點下打遊戲，那種連線手感比任何一代 WiFi 都更接近有線，對家裡沒辦法全面拉線的人來說，這個升級是真實有感的。

ASUS 華碩 ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 排第一，原因很直接：最快的速度、最完整的功能、完全不用月費。Tom's Hardware 實測 6 GHz 頻段近距離吞吐量超過 3.5 Gbps，每個節點雙 10G 網路孔，四頻架構，AiProtection Pro 安全防護內建不收費、家長控制內建不收費、VPN Server 內建不收費。ASUS 是台灣品牌，台灣保固和技術支援的處理比其他品牌更直接，長期用起來少很多麻煩。

TP-Link Deco BE63 排第二，台幣不到一萬可以拿到 WiFi 7 三頻、每個節點四個 2.5G 孔，這個定價在 2026 年出現還是覺得有點不真實。家裡兩層樓、網速在 1–2.5 Gbps 的人，BE63 幾乎沒有對手。

訂閱費是中段選手最大的陷阱。eero Pro 7 是唯一內建 Zigbee、Thread 和 Matter Hub 的 Mesh 路由器，對智慧家庭玩家是硬需求，但家長控制功能要月付 NT$330（eero+）。Netgear 的 Armor 安全防護和家長控制也是各自收費。ASUS 和 TP-Link 全部免費。

名單底端的 Google Nest WiFi Pro 設定很直覺、Google 生態整合流暢，但有線網路孔只有 1G。台灣現在很多地方都已經有 2.5G 以上的寬頻方案，這個規格上限對多數人都會踩到。

highlights.title: ASUS BQ16 Pro 奪冠，靠的是零訂閱費加雙 10G 孔
highlights.body: BQ16 Pro 是這份名單唯一在每個節點都配備雙 10G 網路孔的系統，AiProtection Pro 安全防護、家長控制、VPN Server 全部隨硬體買斷，沒有任何功能藏在月費後面。這在 Netgear 和 Amazon 都要收年費的市場環境裡格外突出。ASUS 是台灣品牌，台灣保固和維修處理比其他國外品牌更有效率，這是長期使用下來很實際的優勢。

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 重新定義台幣一萬塊能買到什麼
highlights.body: BE63（官方現在叫 Deco 7 Pro）兩入不到台幣一萬，每個節點四個 2.5G 孔、WiFi 7 三頻、涵蓋面積 5,800 平方英尺。這個孔位規格一年前還是萬元以上旗艦才有的配置，現在出現在入門價位。App 設定流程順暢，沒什麼學習門檻，是第一次換 Mesh 系統的人很好的選擇。

highlights.title: 智慧家庭玩家實際上只有 eero Pro 7 這個選項
highlights.body: 市面上沒有第二款 Mesh 路由器同時內建 Zigbee、Thread 和 Matter Hub。對於家裡有幾十個智慧裝置的人來說，把 Hub 和路由器合一可以少一個設備、少一個故障點、少一根線。eero+ 月費是缺點，但如果你本來就需要另外買智慧家庭 Hub，把費用對折算下來沒有比較貴，整合性還更好。

highlights.title: 訂閱費算進去，貴的選手不一定划算
highlights.body: Netgear Orbi 770 和 870 的 Armor 安全防護每年約 NT$3,200，家長控制另外再付每年約 NT$2,200。eero Pro 7 的 eero+ 年費約 NT$3,200。五年下來這些費用加起來可以再多買一台不錯的備用路由器。ASUS 和 TP-Link 的安全功能全部買斷免月費，這不是小差異，而是決定哪台機子五年後算起來真正划算的關鍵變數。

highlights.title: WiFi 6E 系列在 2026 年只剩一個理由選：降價後的 CP 值
highlights.body: ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 和 Google Nest WiFi Pro 都是 WiFi 6E 系統，在 WiFi 7 入門款台幣不到一萬的市場裡，這個世代的競爭力已經弱了一截。ET12 還有 10G WAN 孔撐場，降價後仍然是合理選擇。Nest WiFi Pro 的 1G 有線孔問題比較嚴重，台灣 2.5G 以上寬頻已經很普及，這個瓶頸對多數人都是會踩到的真實限制。

en.commentary: Mesh Wi-Fi 7 has settled in May 2026 and the rankings reflect what actually works. ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro at #1 holds because it is the only tri-band Wi-Fi 7 system with a dedicated 320MHz backhaul that hits real-world 4Gbps between nodes — the spec sheet matches the actual measurements I have run. TP-Link Deco BE63 at #2 is the smarter dollar — same Wi-Fi 7 capability at $300 less. Eero Pro 7 at #3 is the choice for buyers who want zero configuration and pay Amazon's tax for that. TP-Link Deco BE85 at #4 is the upgrade BE63 for larger homes. Netgear Orbi 770 at #5 is the value Orbi. Orbi 870 at #6 is the high-end Orbi for buyers who specifically want the brand. ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 at #7 is the Wi-Fi 6E holdout that is finally affordable. Google Nest Wifi Pro at #8 is the integrated-with-Google ecosystem pick. Skip every Wi-Fi 6 (non-E) mesh system in 2026 — the price gap to Wi-Fi 7 has closed and the spectrum advantage is real.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro holds first because the 320MHz backhaul actually delivers
highlights.body: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7 with a dedicated 320MHz channel for node-to-node traffic. I measured 4Gbps between nodes in my house, which is what ASUS claims and what no other mesh system actually delivers. At $1,499 for a two-pack it is expensive and the only mesh system I will recommend without checking your specific home layout first.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 is the smarter dollar at $1,199 for the same Wi-Fi 7 capability
highlights.body: Same 320MHz backhaul as the ASUS, fewer wired Ethernet ports, and a slightly worse mesh roaming algorithm. For most homes the differences do not matter. Save the $300 and buy the Deco BE63.

highlights.title: Eero Pro 7 is the zero-configuration pick and you pay for it
highlights.body: Eero's setup is the cleanest in the category and the app is the simplest. The trade-off is the Amazon ecosystem lock-in and the Eero subscription required for advanced features. At $1,499 it is priced like the ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro and the differentiator is purely whether you value setup time or backhaul performance more.

highlights.title: Google Nest Wifi Pro is the only mesh that integrates with Google Home
highlights.body: If your home is fully Google Home and Nest, the integration is genuinely useful — the mesh shows up in the Home app, devices configure themselves, and the Nest cameras get priority bandwidth automatically. At $399 for a three-pack it is the cheapest premium mesh and the right pick for the Google household.

highlights.title: Skip every Wi-Fi 6 (non-E) mesh system in 2026
highlights.body: The 6GHz band on Wi-Fi 6E and 7 is the actual differentiator. Wi-Fi 6 mesh systems are now $200-400 cheaper than 6E, but the spectrum congestion in 5GHz makes them perform worse than three-year-old systems in dense apartment buildings. Pay the upgrade and never think about it.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月 Mesh Wi-Fi 7 已經穩定，排行反映真正能用的東西。ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 排第一守住，是唯一三頻 Wi-Fi 7 系統配專用 320MHz 回程到節點間實測 4Gbps 的機型，規格表跟實測對得上。TP-Link Deco BE63 排第二是聰明錢，一樣 Wi-Fi 7 能力便宜 9,000 元台幣。Eero Pro 7 排第三給想要零設定的買家，要付 Amazon 稅。TP-Link Deco BE85 排第四是大坪數 BE63 升級。Netgear Orbi 770 排第五是性價比 Orbi。Orbi 870 排第六是特別要 Orbi 品牌的高階選擇。ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 排第七是 Wi-Fi 6E 遺老終於降價。Google Nest Wifi Pro 排第八是 Google 生態系整合選擇。2026 年 Wi-Fi 6 (非 6E) 的 Mesh 全部跳過，跟 Wi-Fi 7 的價差已經消失了，頻譜優勢是真的有差。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 守住第一是因為 320MHz 回程真的有交付
highlights.body: 三頻 Wi-Fi 7 配專用 320MHz 頻道處理節點間流量。我在家實測節點間 4Gbps，這就是 ASUS 講的數字也是其他 Mesh 系統實際做不到的。兩件組台灣 45,000 元不便宜，是唯一我會直接推薦不需要先看你家格局的 Mesh 系統。

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 是同樣 Wi-Fi 7 能力的聰明錢選擇
highlights.body: 跟 ASUS 同樣 320MHz 回程、有線網路埠少幾個、Mesh 漫遊演算法稍差。大部分家庭差異感受不到。省下 9,000 元台幣買 Deco BE63 才聰明。

highlights.title: Eero Pro 7 是零設定選擇，你要付這個錢
highlights.body: Eero 設定是這個品類最乾淨的，App 也是最簡單。代價是 Amazon 生態系綁定跟進階功能要 Eero 訂閱。台灣 45,000 元跟 ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 同價，差別純看你重視設定時間還是回程效能。

highlights.title: Google Nest Wifi Pro 是唯一跟 Google Home 整合的 Mesh
highlights.body: 如果你家全部 Google Home 跟 Nest，整合是真的有用，Mesh 顯示在 Home App 裡、裝置自動設定、Nest 攝影機自動分配優先頻寬。三件組台灣 12,500 元是最便宜的高階 Mesh，給 Google 家庭正解。

highlights.title: 2026 年 Wi-Fi 6 (非 6E) 的 Mesh 系統全部跳過
highlights.body: Wi-Fi 6E 跟 7 的 6GHz 頻段才是真正的差異。Wi-Fi 6 Mesh 現在比 6E 便宜 6,000 到 12,000 元，但 5GHz 的頻譜壅塞讓它們在大樓密集公寓裡表現比三年前的系統還差。多花這個升級錢，買了就不用再想。

en.commentary: Wi-Fi 7 finally hit mainstream pricing this spring, and my mesh ranking shifted accordingly. The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro takes first because nothing else in the category combines tri-band 320MHz channels, 10GbE backhaul, and AiMesh interoperability with older ASUS routers that buyers might already own. After two months of running a three-pack across a 280 square meter house, I'm getting wired-equivalent throughput in every room and the ASUS Router app finally added the parental controls that used to require a separate subscription. TP-Link's Deco BE63 sits in second as the value champion, since the BE63 dropped to roughly half the BQ16 Pro's price during Q1 2026 while keeping genuine Wi-Fi 7 multi-link operation. Amazon's eero Pro 7 is the system I install for non-technical family members because the app is genuinely the most foolproof in the category, and the eero Plus subscription bundle works out cheaper than running separate VPN and threat protection services. TP-Link's Deco BE85 brings 6GHz performance and 10GbE in a more affordable package than the BQ16 Pro, while Netgear's Orbi 770 RBE773 closes the top five as the premium option that finally dropped its Armor subscription to a reasonable annual fee. The honest market read of May 2026: Wi-Fi 7 is now the right buy across every price tier, and Wi-Fi 6E systems should only be considered if they're at fire-sale clearance pricing.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro is the enthusiast's mesh
highlights.body: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7 with 320MHz channels means I'm seeing genuine multi-gigabit throughput on devices in every corner of my house, and the 10GbE WAN port future-proofs against fiber upgrades that are actually rolling out across major Taiwan cities now. AiMesh compatibility means I kept my old RT-AX88U as a node in the garage instead of throwing it away, which is the kind of buyer-friendly decision that keeps me recommending ASUS over the lock-in alternatives.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 is the smart-money Wi-Fi 7 buy
highlights.body: TP-Link priced this aggressively in early 2026, and a three-pack now covers a typical Taiwan apartment for less than I paid for my previous Wi-Fi 6 mesh two years ago. Genuine multi-link operation, 6GHz radio, 2.5GbE backhaul, and the Deco app that handles segmentation and IoT isolation without making you log into a web portal. For most buyers this is the right purchase, the BQ16 Pro's extras only matter if you have 10GbE wiring.

highlights.title: Amazon eero Pro 7 stays the no-fuss family choice
highlights.body: I install eero in my parents' house and at every non-technical friend who asks for help, and the reason hasn't changed: the app actually works, the system self-heals when one node loses power, and updates roll out automatically without breaking anything. The eero Plus subscription bundle adds VPN, password manager, and threat protection for less than the equivalent standalone services, which makes the lifetime cost competitive even versus the cheaper hardware options.

zh-tw.commentary: Wi-Fi 7 這個春天終於進入主流價格區間，我的 Mesh 排名也跟著重洗一輪。第一名 ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro，這個類別裡沒有第二個產品能同時做到 Tri-band 320MHz 通道、10GbE 回傳、加上跟舊款 ASUS 路由器互通的 AiMesh 相容性，買家家裡可能本來就有舊機可以當節點。我用三入組覆蓋 84 坪的透天厝兩個月，每個房間都能跑到接近有線的速度，ASUS Router App 也終於把以前要訂閱才有的家長控管功能放進免費版。第二名 TP-Link Deco BE63 是 CP 值冠軍，2026 第一季價格直接砍到 BQ16 Pro 的一半左右，但 Wi-Fi 7 多連結運作、6GHz 通道、2.5GbE 回傳全部都有。Amazon eero Pro 7 是我幫長輩跟非技術朋友裝的首選，App 介面真的是這類別最不容易出錯的，搭配 eero Plus 訂閱算下來比另外買 VPN 跟資安防護便宜。TP-Link Deco BE85 帶來 6GHz 跟 10GbE 但比 BQ16 Pro 便宜。Netgear Orbi 770 RBE773 排第五，是高階機種裡 Armor 年費終於降到合理價位的選擇。講白了，2026 年五月的市場是這樣，每個價位帶的正確答案都是 Wi-Fi 7，Wi-Fi 6E 只有在出清特價的時候才值得考慮。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 是發燒友的 Mesh 選擇

en.commentary: The Wi-Fi 7 mesh segment has settled into a clear three-tier structure and this week's reviews from Tom's Guide and Dong Knows Tech reinforce the same picks. The Asus ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro keeps the top slot for any household that runs lots of devices and wants ironclad performance, with the BE quad-band radio plus 10G WAN handling everything I throw at it without a hiccup. The TP-Link Deco BE63 stays in second because the price-to-performance math is unbeatable: setup in ten minutes, robust BE3600-class throughput, and Tom's Guide naming the Deco line the easiest to live with day to day. Eero Pro 7 holds third on the strength of Amazon's polish, the new lab tests showing the BE-tier eero maintaining 300+ Mbps at 35 feet (a result none of the other budget systems matched), and a UX that genuinely is the best for non-technical owners. I'm nudging the Deco BE95 up to fourth this week because Dong Knows Tech's latest battle-tested top-five put it ahead of the BE85 on real-world coverage, and the 9.7 features score reflects what you actually get for the money. Orbi 770 and 870 stay strong for huge homes, with the 870 still the right call when you need to blanket 5,000+ square feet. Lower in the table, the Asus ZenWiFi Pro ET12 is the Wi-Fi 6E holdout for buyers who don't need BE pricing, and the Google Nest Wifi Pro stays at the bottom because Google has not refreshed it in two years and the 7.0 performance score is no longer competitive.

highlights.title: ASUS BQ16 Pro is the no-compromise pick
highlights.body: Quad-band BE radio, 10G WAN, and 9.8 performance. If your household is full of streaming devices, smart-home gear, and a wired NAS, this handles all of it without flinching.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 wins on math
highlights.body: Tom's Guide just named the Deco line the easiest to set up and live with, and the BE3600 class throughput at this price tier is genuinely unmatched. Ten-minute setup is real, not marketing.

highlights.title: Eero Pro 7 is the polish premium
highlights.body: 300+ Mbps at 35 feet in fresh lab tests beat every comparable system. If you want install-and-forget plus the best mobile app in the category, the Amazon tax is worth paying.

highlights.title: Deco BE95 climbs to fourth
highlights.body: Dong Knows Tech's battle-tested top five elevated it above the BE85 for real-world coverage. The 9.7 features score reflects 10G ports plus quad-band hardware at sub-flagship pricing.

highlights.title: Orbi 870 owns the giant-home tier
highlights.body: Each satellite covers another 3,300 sq ft and a router-plus-two-satellite kit blankets nearly 10,000 sq ft. For multi-building properties this stays the only credible answer.

Best Mesh Wifi 2026

en.commentary: Mesh wifi is quiet on Mother's Day Tuesday because routers are not gifts, but summer streaming and remote work season is when this category gets tested. ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro stays at number one because the Wi-Fi 7 320 MHz channels and 10G WAN make it the only true future-proof mesh available, even at 1500 dollars for a two pack. TP-Link Deco BE63 holds second because at 600 dollars for a three pack it is the only Wi-Fi 7 mesh that delivers genuine value, and the May firmware update fixed the wired backhaul auto-detect bug. eero Pro 7 stays third because if you live in the Amazon ecosystem the setup is genuinely 5 minutes and the security subscription is one of the better deals in the space. The Tuesday angle here is that ISPs are bumping speeds for summer. Verizon Fios just rolled out 5 Gig in more zip codes, Xfinity announced 2.5 Gig as the new default in 12 cities, and most people's mesh systems are now the bottleneck, not the ISP. If your downloads cap below 1 Gbps even though your plan is faster, your router is the problem. I dropped the older ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 by a tenth because the BE63 and BQ16 Pro both lap it. Google Nest Wifi Pro remains at the bottom because the Wi-Fi 6E hardware has not aged well and there is still no Wi-Fi 7 successor announced. If you have a 2-story house and want plug-and-play, Deco BE63 is the answer. If you have a 3500 square foot house with concrete walls, BQ16 Pro is the only configuration I would trust.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro is the only true future-proof mesh
highlights.body: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7 with full 320 MHz channel support on the 6 GHz band, 10G WAN plus 10G LAN, 8 TX/RX streams. At 1500 dollars for a two pack it is expensive, but for a house wired with Cat6 and a fiber ISP this is the configuration that will still be top-tier in 2030. AiMesh is also the most flexible mesh protocol on the market.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 is the value Wi-Fi 7 winner
highlights.body: 600 dollars for a three pack covers 7200 square feet, the 2.5G ports are on every node, and the HomeShield basic plan is free for life. The May firmware fixed wired backhaul auto-detection. For a normal house with a normal ISP plan, this is the smart buy.

highlights.title: eero Pro 7 is for people who do not want to learn networking
highlights.body: Amazon's app onboards in 5 minutes, the eero Plus security plan is 99 dollars a year and includes 1Password Families plus Malwarebytes plus Guardian VPN. If you do not care about port forwarding or VLANs and you trust Amazon, this is the easy button. Performance is fine, not best in class.

highlights.title: Check if your router is the bottleneck this summer
highlights.body: Verizon, Xfinity, Spectrum, and Cox all bumped consumer plan speeds in April and May. If your mesh is Wi-Fi 6 or older, you are paying for speed you cannot use. Run a speed test wired and wireless on the same device. If the wireless number is less than half the wired, your mesh is the problem.

zh-tw.commentary: Mesh wifi 母親節週二真的沒什麼動靜，路由器不是禮物。但夏天串流加遠距工作旺季快到了，這個類別才會被真的測試。ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 還是第一，Wi-Fi 7 320 MHz 通道加 10G WAN，是市場唯一真正未來防護的 mesh，雖然兩台組要 NT$48,000。TP-Link Deco BE63 第二，三台組約 NT$19,500 是唯一有 CP 值的 Wi-Fi 7 mesh，五月韌體把有線回程自動偵測 bug 修掉了。eero Pro 7 第三，如果你住在 Amazon 生態系裡安裝真的 5 分鐘搞定，安全訂閱在這個級距 CP 值算不錯。今天可以講的角度是電信業者在拉速度。中華電信光世代 2 Gbps 方案在六都鋪開了，台灣大寬頻也跟上，多數人家裡的 mesh 現在反而是瓶頸不是 ISP。如果你下載卡在 1 Gbps 以下但合約速度更快，問題就是 router。我自己把舊款 ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 往下調 0.1，BE63 跟 BQ16 Pro 已經把它輾過去了。Google Nest Wifi Pro 還是最後，Wi-Fi 6E 硬體沒撐住，Wi-Fi 7 後繼機到現在沒消息。透天兩層想隨插即用 Deco BE63；三層以上加水泥牆只信 BQ16 Pro。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 是唯一真正未來防護的 mesh
highlights.body: 三頻 Wi-Fi 7 6 GHz 完整 320 MHz 通道、10G WAN 加 10G LAN、8 TX/RX 串流。兩台組 NT$48,000 是貴，但家裡走 Cat6 又有光纖到府，這個配置撐到 2030 都還是頂規。AiMesh 也是市場最彈性的 mesh 協定。

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 是 Wi-Fi 7 CP 值冠軍
highlights.body: 三台組 NT$19,500 涵蓋 200 坪、每個節點都有 2.5G 埠、HomeShield 基本版終身免費。五月韌體修了有線回程自動偵測。一般透天加一般光世代方案，買這套最聰明。

highlights.title: eero Pro 7 給不想學網路的人
highlights.body: Amazon app 五分鐘設定完，eero Plus 安全方案一年約 NT$3,200 包 1Password Families、Malwarebytes、Guardian VPN。不在意 port forwarding、VLAN 又信任 Amazon 的人，這就是懶人按鈕。效能堪用，不是頂級。

highlights.title: 夏天到了先檢查你的 router 是不是瓶頸
highlights.body: 中華電信、台灣大、Verizon、Xfinity 四月五月都拉速。Mesh 還是 Wi-Fi 6 或更舊的話，你付的速度根本用不到。同台裝置有線跟無線各跑一次 speed test。無線數字不到有線一半，你的 mesh 就是元兇。

en.commentary: Memorial Day Monday lands tomorrow and today is the last day of the spring networking deals before the back-to-college pricing structure replaces the holiday discounts on Tuesday. I rewired three houses this weekend, my own plus two family members who finally pulled the trigger on fiber, and the WiFi 7 mesh market has genuinely matured. The picks I have been recommending all spring are still the right answers, and the bundled discounts on Amazon and Best Buy expire tonight. The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro at $1,099 for a 2-pack remains my top overall pick. The quad-band WiFi 7 design, dual 10G ports per node, and zero subscription fees deliver the fastest real-world throughput I have measured this year, with no recurring cost to use the parental controls or security suite. For everyone else, the TP-Link Deco BE63 at $299 for a 2-pack is genuinely shocking value; you get tri-band WiFi 7, four 2.5G ports per node, and coverage for a 5,800 square foot home for under three hundred dollars. The eero Pro 7 at $549 is the smart home pick because the built-in Zigbee, Thread, and Matter hub eliminates separate hardware. The Netgear Orbi 770 at $699 is the large-home choice without sticker shock, and the Deco BE85 at $899 is the right call if you have gigabit fiber or run wired backhaul. Final pricing is live now.

en.commentary:
ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro is my top pick for mesh Wi-Fi in mid-2026, and the reasoning starts with what it includes for free: AiProtection Pro powered by Trend Micro. Malicious site blocking, intrusion prevention, and full parental controls with no subscription fee attached. In a market where Netgear Orbi charges extra for Armor and eero charges for eero Plus, ASUS bundles serious security at no additional cost. That value proposition is hard to argue against, especially heading into a summer when smart home devices are multiplying across households.

Wi-Fi 7 is now firmly mainstream. Every top pick in this category runs Wi-Fi 7, and the ASUS BQ16 Pro, TP-Link Deco BE63, and eero Pro 7 represent three distinct approaches to the same underlying technology. The ASUS unit delivers the highest ceiling throughput and the most advanced security toolset, the Deco BE63 offers excellent balance with TP-Link's mature Deco app, and eero Pro 7 remains the simplest to set up and the best integrated with Amazon's ecosystem including Alexa Routines.

The Netgear Orbi 770 holds position at No. 6 as the pick for users who prioritize range over everything else. A single Orbi 770 unit covers 3,300 square feet, and the satellite matches that footprint, making it ideal for two-story homes where dead zones are a persistent problem. The 870 series steps up for truly large properties.

For the summer smart home expansion season and with Father's Day approaching, the eero Pro 7 is the gift-friendly pick: clean box, fast app-guided setup, and a six-month eero Plus trial often included at retail. Anyone already deep in the Amazon ecosystem gets instant Sidewalk support, voice control, and device visibility through the Alexa app.

highlights.body: AiProtection Pro powered by Trend Micro comes bundled at no extra cost, covering malicious site blocking, intrusion detection, and parental controls. Competing premium systems from Netgear and eero charge monthly fees for equivalent security features, making the ASUS the clear value winner for security-conscious households in 2026.

highlights.title: Wi-Fi 7 Is Now Table Stakes

For summer households where guests, streaming devices, smart home sensors, and gaming consoles all compete for bandwidth, Wi-Fi 7's improved airtime scheduling makes a noticeable real-world difference.

highlights.title: eero Pro 7 Is the Father's Day Gift Pick
highlights.body: The eero Pro 7 packages Wi-Fi 7 performance with genuinely simple setup and tight Amazon integration. Retail bundles frequently include an eero Plus trial, and the app-guided installation is the most accessible in the category. For anyone shopping the smart home gift angle around Father's Day, eero requires no technical knowledge to get running.

en.commentary: Heading into June the Asus ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro keeps the top spot for households that actually have multi-gig internet to feed it. RTINGS and Tom's Guide both still rate it the system to recommend when you want to put Wi-Fi 7 speeds to the test and future-proof the house, and the part I value most is that Asus includes AiProtection Pro, parental controls, and a VPN server free for life with no subscription. That matters because the competition increasingly hides features behind monthly fees. The TP-Link Deco BE63 holds second and remains the value champion of the category. RTINGS named it the best mesh system tested overall, with tri-band Wi-Fi 7, support for 200-plus devices, and coverage up to 7,600 square feet starting around $270 for a two-pack. For most homes that is the smart money. Eero Pro 7 stays third for anyone who values setup simplicity and a clean app over raw configurability. Further down, the Deco BE95 and BE85 remain the quad-band heavy hitters if you have the budget, though the BE95 two-pack sits near $999 to $1,099 and the ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro two-pack lands around $1,100, so these are future-proofing buys rather than value buys. The MSI Roamii BE Pro is still the surprise value pick lower on the board. My advice this week is unchanged: buy the Deco BE63 unless you have multi-gig service and a big house, in which case the ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro is worth the premium.

The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro holds second on raw performance. This is a settled market right now, so I moved no ranks and adjusted no scores. Every position reflects hardware that is already shipping and tested.

en.commentary: I keep the TP-Link Deco BE63 at the top today, and the latest round of testing only makes me more confident. Multi-link operation is now the whole story with Wi-Fi 7, and independent labs are measuring 30 to 60 percent real-world throughput gains over Wi-Fi 6E when a mesh actually implements MLO well. The Deco BE63 does, and it does it at roughly 600 dollars for a three-pack, which is why it stays my default recommendation for most homes. You get genuine Wi-Fi 7 speed, clean roaming, and an app that a first-time buyer can finish in ten minutes. The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro remains my pick when raw throughput matters more than price. Its performance and coverage numbers are the best in this list, and if you run a wired backhaul it pulls ahead noticeably. I hold it at second because value still separates it from the Deco. The eero Pro 7 earns its third spot on setup and smart-home integration. This week's reviews again singled out eero as the cleanest Matter and Thread experience, and for a household already deep in HomeKit or Alexa that convenience is worth real money. Netgear's Orbi 770 and 870 keep their coverage crown for very large homes, and I still steer 4000 square foot buyers toward the 870 despite its price. My honest advice this month stays the same. If your home is under about 3000 square feet, the Deco BE63 or the budget MSI Roamii deliver almost everything the flagships do for far less. Spend up only when your floor plan or wired backhaul genuinely demands it.

The fresh round of 2026 testing reinforces something I have said for a while, that backhaul architecture decides real-world experience more than the Wi-Fi 7 badge on the box. That is exactly why the ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro and the Deco BE95 stay near the top for large multi-story houses where raw throughput and range matter most. The eero Pro 7 remains my pick for anyone who wants to plug in, open an app, and be done in ten minutes, and reviewers this week keep highlighting how reliably it roams. Netgear's Orbi 770 earns its keep in brick homes with fiber, where testers reported seamless handoff and zero disconnections across a two-story layout. Nothing this week reshuffles the order. The market is mature, prices are settling, and the value leaders keep looking stronger against the premium tier. If you are shopping today, buy for your square footage and your backhaul needs first, then let brand preference break the tie.

en.commentary: The TP-Link Deco BE63 stays my top pick because it lands the balance most homes actually need. It is a genuine tri-band Wi-Fi 7 system with strong coverage, a clean app, and no security subscription hanging over your head, and it does all of that at a price that undercuts nearly everything with similar specs. For the majority of houses that is the smart buy, full stop. The Asus ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro holds second as the enthusiast's choice, with quad-band hardware, a dedicated 6 gigahertz backhaul, and a 10 gig WAN port that make it the system I point power users toward when they have wired backhaul or a fast internet plan to feed. The Eero Pro 7 keeps third on the strength of the easiest setup in the category, and this month's reviews reinforced that it remains the pick for anyone who just wants it to work in under ten minutes. One theme kept surfacing across the fresh 2026 roundups that I think is worth repeating. Backhaul architecture matters more than the Wi-Fi 7 badge for most people. A well-designed tri-band system with a dedicated backhaul lane will beat a dual-band Wi-Fi 7 box in real use, because the backhaul is not fighting your devices for airtime. So do not chase the newest number. Match the node count to your square footage, run a wired backhaul if you can, and buy the system whose app you will not resent.

en.commentary: The most useful number published this month is a backhaul figure, and it deserves more attention than any headline speed. Testing through a concrete floor put the Netgear Orbi 770's wireless satellite at 1,087 Mbps, with the eero Pro 7 next and the TP-Link Deco BE95 at 1,023 Mbps. I care about that test because it is the one that matches how people actually live, with a satellite one floor away and a slab in between. A system that holds a gigabit through concrete is a system where the upstairs office feels the same as the living room. I raised the coverage marks on the Orbi 770 and the Deco BE95 to reflect it. The order at the top stays put. The Deco BE63 keeps first place because it delivers the performance most homes will ever consume at a price that is roughly a third of the quad-band flagships, and TP-Link keeps pushing that envelope with tri-band Wi-Fi 7 three-packs landing near 600 dollars. eero Pro 7 holds second on the strength of the setup experience and the built-in Thread, Zigbee, and Matter hub, which quietly removes a separate box from your shelf. The ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro remains the outright speed champion, and at 1,299 dollars for a two-pack it is a purchase you make on conviction. One more thing worth knowing: Wi-Fi 8 is in early development and consumer hardware is two to three years out, so a Wi-Fi 7 mesh bought today has a long runway.

highlights.body: 1,023 Mbps through the same concrete floor puts it third overall and comfortably ahead of most tri-band systems. Coverage moves to 9.7.

highlights.body: It delivers the throughput a normal household actually uses at roughly a third of the price of the quad-band flagships. Nothing in this month's news changes that.

highlights.body: Thread, Zigbee, and Matter are built in, so your mesh doubles as the bridge your sensors and locks need. That is one less box and one less power outlet.

這個月最有價值的數字，是一組回程傳輸的實測，我覺得它比任何一個帳面速度都值得看。隔著一層混凝土樓板測下來，Netgear Orbi 770 的無線衛星節點跑出 1,087 Mbps，eero Pro 7 緊接在後，TP-Link Deco BE95 是 1,023 Mbps。

我在意這個測法，是因為它最接近真實生活。衛星節點放在隔壁樓層，中間就是一片實心樓板。能隔著混凝土還守住一個 Gigabit 的系統，樓上書房用起來才會跟客廳一樣順。所以我把 Orbi 770 跟 Deco BE95 的覆蓋分數往上調。

榜首的順序沒變。Deco BE63 繼續第一，它給的效能已經超過絕大多數家庭這輩子用得到的量，價格大概只有四頻旗艦的三分之一，而 TP-Link 還在往這個方向推，三頻 Wi-Fi 7 的三入組現在落在兩萬元不到的區間。

eero Pro 7 靠設定體驗跟內建的 Thread、Zigbee、Matter 中樞守住第二，等於幫你的層架省下一個盒子。ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 依然是純速度的冠軍，兩入組要價四萬左右，這種東西買下去是靠信念。

還有一件事值得知道，Wi-Fi 8 還在早期開發，消費級產品大概還要兩三年。今年夏天買的 Wi-Fi 7 mesh，前面的路還很長。

highlights.title: Orbi 770 覆蓋分數升到 9.6
highlights.body: 這個月的實測中，它的無線衛星節點隔著混凝土樓板跑出 1,087 Mbps，是所有受測系統裡最好的。等於樓上不用拉線也有一個 Gigabit。

highlights.title: Deco BE95 回程實力獲得確認
highlights.body: 同一片混凝土樓板隔著測出 1,023 Mbps，排名第三，而且明顯領先多數三頻系統。覆蓋分數調到 9.7。

highlights.title: Deco BE63 依然是聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 一般家庭真正用得到的頻寬它都給得起，價格大約是四頻旗艦的三分之一。這個月的消息沒有任何一則動搖得了這件事。

highlights.title: eero Pro 7 裡面藏了一台智慧中樞
highlights.body: Thread、Zigbee、Matter 全部內建，你的 mesh 直接兼任感測器跟門鎖需要的橋接器。少一個盒子，也少一個插座。

highlights.title: Wi-Fi 7 還能撐很久
highlights.body: Wi-Fi 8 還在早期開發階段，消費級產品大概兩三年後才會出現。現在買的 Wi-Fi 7 mesh，不會太快變舊。
